title: Redundant pairs of parentheses should be removed
description: Redundant pairs of parentheses should be removedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEThis rule is deprecated, and will eventually be removed.Parentheses can disambiguate the order of operations in complex expressions and make the code easier to understand.a = (b * c) + (d * e); //
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Remove redundant parentheses around simple variable assignment.
Remove redundant parentheses around number assignment.
Remove redundant parentheses around boolean assignment.
Remove redundant inner parentheses in if condition.
